description: Resend provides an email platform for developers to send, receive, and manage email, contacts, domains, broadcasts, templates, and related workflows. It also offers AI-oriented tooling such as a hosted MCP server and CLI for agent and automation use.
summary: Resend exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at api.resend.com with published OpenAPI specs, an OAuth-protected hosted MCP server at mcp.resend.com, and a Resend CLI authenticated with an API key.
